creator: dennis.noordsij@alumni.helsinki.fi
text:
(Coming here via #261127 - "ifconfig wg0 destroy" also triggering this problem)

Can confirm this is (still) happening on Hetzner (CPX) VPS's with 13.0-RELEASE-p6

Blacklisting virtio_random fixes (works around) the issue.

Regarding ready installation images; I usually boot the rescue mode and install manually by creating partitions and untarring the base system, so perhaps Hetzner/Vultr provide installation media where virtio_random is already pre-blacklisted).

Have a system available for any testing/debugging, or even just try to detect if the issue would occur and not load the driver, if someone wants to point me in the right direction.
